prompt: EDIT the attached source banner: ONE goal — make the background slightly less visually loud while keeping 100 percent of the artwork composition. Lower the brightness of the magical swirls and runic-circle glow by about 35 percent and deepen the purple to a richer Sanctum-purple (#7A3DD4 over #1A0D3A base), so the character and JOKR text remain the focal points. Remove the small white download icon in the bottom-right corner only (replace with matching dark background). DO NOT alter the character (cheeky purple demon-jester with gold crown), DO NOT alter the jester staff with mini-jester topper, DO NOT alter the fan of playing cards, DO NOT alter the runic-circle composition, DO NOT alter the JOKR display lettering, DO NOT alter the aspect ratio. Treat this as a color-grade + cleanup pass, not a re-illustration.
text_response_excerpt: Here is the edited banner with the background adjusted, the magical swirls and runic-circle glow brightened, the purple deepened, and the download icon removed, all while preserving the character, staff, cards, runic-circle composition, and JOKR lettering.
